syntax_9217.creator: DereWah
syntax_9217.title: Telegram Sender of Message
syntax_9217.description: The sender of a Telegram Message.

en: The sender of a Telegram Message.

syntax_9192.creator: DereWah
syntax_9192.title: Telegram Bot Login
syntax_9192.description: Create a session and authenticate to a telegram bot, given its username and its token.
syntax_9192.syntax_pattern: telegram login to bot %string% with token %string%

en: Create a session and authenticate to a telegram bot, given its username and its token.

syntax_9193.creator: DereWah
syntax_9193.title: Clear all telegram sessions
syntax_9193.description: Close all the telegram sessions that are active. Stops any running bot. You should use this in case you get an api error 409 saying multiple instances are running a single bot. Please note that closing a session may take up to 50 seconds, as it is delayed by the Telegram API itself.

en: Close all the telegram sessions that are active. Stops any running bot. You should use this in case you get an api error 409 saying multiple instances are running a single bot. Please note that closing a session may take up to 50 seconds, as it is delayed by the Telegram API itself.

syntax_9197.creator: DereWah
syntax_9197.title: Telegram Message
syntax_9197.description: This type holds all the information about a message. You can either get this object in a telegram event (event-telegram message) or by creating a new one (new telegram message with text %string%)

en: This type holds all the information about a message. You can either get this object in a telegram event (event-telegram message) or by creating a new one (new telegram message with text %string%)

syntax_9198.creator: DereWah
syntax_9198.title: Telegram Chat
syntax_9198.description: This type holds all the information about a telegram chat.

en: This type holds all the information about a telegram chat.

syntax_9200.creator: DereWah
syntax_9200.title: Telegram Inline Keyboard
syntax_9200.description: This type represents a Telegram Inline Keyboard. A keyboard is a matrix of buttons (double list). You can access the rows of the keyboard with the row expression.
syntax_9200.type_usage:
1st row of keyboard %inlinekeyboard%
inline keyboard of %telegrammessage%

en: This type represents a Telegram Inline Keyboard. A keyboard is a matrix of buttons (double list). You can access the rows of the keyboard with the row expression.

syntax_9201.creator: DereWah
syntax_9201.title: Telegram Inline Button
syntax_9201.description:
This type represents a Telegram Inline Button. You can't add simply the button to a message, but you need first to add it into a keyboard. You can then add the keyboard to the message. (Otherwise, how would Telegram know which position the button would have to be?)

Of a button, you can define its text (the displayed button itself) and its action. If you set its URL, it will open automatically a link when clicked. If you set its callback data, you can specify the data that is sent to the bot when clicked. You can listen to such data with the EvtCallbackQuery
syntax_9201.type_usage:
text of %inlinebutton%
callback data of %inlinebutton%
url of %inlinebutton%

en:
This type represents a Telegram Inline Button. You can't add simply the button to a message, but you need first to add it into a keyboard. You can then add the keyboard to the message. (Otherwise, how would Telegram know which position the button would have to be?)

Of a button, you can define its text (the displayed button itself) and its action. If you set its URL, it will open automatically a link when clicked. If you set its callback data, you can specify the data that is sent to the bot when clicked. You can listen to such data with the EvtCallbackQuery

syntax_9202.creator: DereWah
syntax_9202.title: Telegram Message Event
syntax_9202.description: Fires whenever a message (or command) is received. You can access the received message with event-telegram message

en: Fires whenever a message (or command) is received. You can access the received message with event-telegram message

syntax_9203.creator: DereWah
syntax_9203.title: Telegram CallbackQuery Event
syntax_9203.description: Fires whenever a button with a callback data is fired. You can specify for which data to listen or leave it blank to listen for any button press
syntax_9203.event_values:
event-callback query
event-telegram user
event-telegram message
event-telegram bot

en: Fires whenever a button with a callback data is fired. You can specify for which data to listen or leave it blank to listen for any button press

syntax_9204.creator: DereWah
syntax_9204.title: Callback Query
syntax_9204.description: This type represents a Callback Query. A callback query is what the bot receives when an inline button is pressed. You can see for example the callback data of the button with callback data of %callbackquery%

en: This type represents a Callback Query. A callback query is what the bot receives when an inline button is pressed. You can see for example the callback data of the button with callback data of %callbackquery%

syntax_9205.creator: DereWah
syntax_9205.title: New Telegram Message
syntax_9205.description: Returns a new empty telegram message. You can use other expressions to change its properties, such as text, keyboard, etc. You may use this outside of a Telegram Event, but in order to send it you'll have to specify bot you are using.

en: Returns a new empty telegram message. You can use other expressions to change its properties, such as text, keyboard, etc. You may use this outside of a Telegram Event, but in order to send it you'll have to specify bot you are using.

syntax_9206.creator: DereWah
syntax_9206.title: Last Telegram Sent Message
syntax_9206.description: Returns the last sent message. Use this exclusively and immediately after sending a message.

en: Returns the last sent message. Use this exclusively and immediately after sending a message.

syntax_9207.creator: DereWah
syntax_9207.title: Telegram Chat of Message
syntax_9207.description: Returns a Telegram Chat type. The chat in which a message has been sent. Can not be set.

en: Returns a Telegram Chat type. The chat in which a message has been sent. Can not be set.

syntax_9208.creator: DereWah
syntax_9208.title: Telegram Text of Message
syntax_9208.description: Returns the text of a telegram message. Can be changed to edit the message.

en: Returns the text of a telegram message. Can be changed to edit the message.

syntax_9195.creator: DereWah
syntax_9195.title: Send telegram message
syntax_9195.description: Send a telegram message. The message can be a string or can be an existing message. The target chat ID can be used to specify the destination of the message. If used inside of a Telegram Event, the bot to use is automatically detected. To use it outside of a Telegram Event, specify the username of the bot. If a session exists for that bot, the message will be sent.
syntax_9195.syntax_pattern: send telegram message %string/telegrammessage% [with markdown] to %telegramuser/telegramchat/number% [with bot %string%]

en: Send a telegram message. The message can be a string or can be an existing message. The target chat ID can be used to specify the destination of the message. If used inside of a Telegram Event, the bot to use is automatically detected. To use it outside of a Telegram Event, specify the username of the bot. If a session exists for that bot, the message will be sent.

syntax_9196.creator: DereWah
syntax_9196.title: Reply telegram message
syntax_9196.description: Send a telegram message, as a reply to another message. The reply message can be a string or can be an existing message. If used inside of a Telegram Event, the bot to use is automatically detected. To use it outside of a Telegram Event, specify the username of the bot. If a session exists for that bot, the message will be sent.
syntax_9196.syntax_pattern: reply to telegram message %telegrammessage% with %telegrammessage/string% [with markdown] [with bot %-string%]

en: Send a telegram message, as a reply to another message. The reply message can be a string or can be an existing message. If used inside of a Telegram Event, the bot to use is automatically detected. To use it outside of a Telegram Event, specify the username of the bot. If a session exists for that bot, the message will be sent.

syntax_9209.creator: DereWah
syntax_9209.title: Telegram Id
syntax_9209.description: Returns the Numeric ID of a telegram object. Each user has an unique ID. The ID of a chat is identic to a user ID if it's its private chat with the bot. (It is different if it's a group or supergroup etc.). Each message has an unique ID inside of a chat. Can't be set.
syntax_9209.syntax_pattern:
id of %telegrammessage%
id of %telegramuser%
id of %telegramchat%

en: Returns the Numeric ID of a telegram object. Each user has an unique ID. The ID of a chat is identic to a user ID if it's its private chat with the bot. (It is different if it's a group or supergroup etc.). Each message has an unique ID inside of a chat. Can't be set.

syntax_9210.creator: DereWah
syntax_9210.title: Telegram Chat Type
syntax_9210.description: Returns the type of a telegram chat. It can be "PRIVATE", "BOT", "GROUP", "SUPERGROUP" or "CHANNEL". Can't be set.

en: Returns the type of a telegram chat. It can be "PRIVATE", "BOT", "GROUP", "SUPERGROUP" or "CHANNEL". Can't be set.

syntax_9211.creator: DereWah
syntax_9211.title: Callback Data of InlineButton
syntax_9211.description: The callback data of an Inline Button. This is the text that is sent to the bot on a button press, and it can be listened for with the On Callback Query event.

en: The callback data of an Inline Button. This is the text that is sent to the bot on a button press, and it can be listened for with the On Callback Query event.

syntax_9212.creator: DereWah
syntax_9212.title: Callback Data of CallbackQuery
syntax_9212.description: The callback data of a Callback Query. You can use this to check what telegram button was pressed, based on the callback data you had set.

en: The callback data of a Callback Query. You can use this to check what telegram button was pressed, based on the callback data you had set.

syntax_9213.creator: DereWah
syntax_9213.title: Text of InlineButton
syntax_9213.description: The Displayed text of an Inline Button. This is the actual message a button has in the chat.

en: The Displayed text of an Inline Button. This is the actual message a button has in the chat.

syntax_9214.creator: DereWah
syntax_9214.title: Url of InlineButton
syntax_9214.description: The URL of an Inline Button. Note that a button can't have both a callback data and an URL. The link will be opened on button press.

en: The URL of an Inline Button. Note that a button can't have both a callback data and an URL. The link will be opened on button press.

syntax_9215.creator: DereWah
syntax_9215.title: Row of InlineKeyboard
syntax_9215.description: The row of an existing InlineKeyboard. You can add, remove, set and clear rows. Setting a row that doesn't exist on the keyboard will simply append it to the bottom.

en: The row of an existing InlineKeyboard. You can add, remove, set and clear rows. Setting a row that doesn't exist on the keyboard will simply append it to the bottom.

syntax_9216.creator: DereWah
syntax_9216.title: Inline Keyboard of Message
syntax_9216.description: The Inline Keyboard of a Telegram Message. You can use this to add a keyboard to existing messages, before sending them.

en: The Inline Keyboard of a Telegram Message. You can use this to add a keyboard to existing messages, before sending them.

syntax_9199.creator: DereWah
syntax_9199.title: Telegram User
syntax_9199.description: This type represents a Telegram User.

en: This type represents a Telegram User.

syntax_9194.creator: DereWah
syntax_9194.title: Clear Telegram Session
syntax_9194.description: Closes the telegram session of a specific bot. Please note that closing a session may take up to 50 seconds, as it is delayed by the Telegram API itself.

en: Closes the telegram session of a specific bot. Please note that closing a session may take up to 50 seconds, as it is delayed by the Telegram API itself.

syntax_9219.creator: DereWah
syntax_9219.title: Telegram Bot
syntax_9219.description: This type represents a telegram bot. It holds information about the bot that fired a spefific event. You can view its username (to check if the bot is the one you're creating in skript) with "%username of event-telegram bot%" or with "%event-telegram bot%" Since Telegram Events are fired by all bots ran on a server, you should always filter that the received event is fired by the bot you're programming.

en: This type represents a telegram bot. It holds information about the bot that fired a spefific event. You can view its username (to check if the bot is the one you're creating in skript) with "%username of event-telegram bot%" or with "%event-telegram bot%" Since Telegram Events are fired by all bots ran on a server, you should always filter that the received event is fired by the bot you're programming.

syntax_9220.creator: DereWah
syntax_9220.title: Answer to Callback Query
syntax_9220.description: Show a little notification to a user after they pressed a button. This will also complete a button press, removing the little clock that shows on the button when it gets pressed. Adding "with popup" will show the callback query answer in a popup window, and the user will have to press OK to hide it.
syntax_9220.syntax_pattern: answer to callback query %callbackquery% with %string% [with popup]

en: Show a little notification to a user after they pressed a button. This will also complete a button press, removing the little clock that shows on the button when it gets pressed. Adding "with popup" will show the callback query answer in a popup window, and the user will have to press OK to hide it.

syntax_9221.creator: DereWah
syntax_9221.title: Forward Telegram Message
syntax_9221.description: Forward an existing telegram message, and send it to a user. The final message will have information about who sent it in the first place. It will show "forwarded from" to its top.

en: Forward an existing telegram message, and send it to a user. The final message will have information about who sent it in the first place. It will show "forwarded from" to its top.

syntax_9222.creator: DereWah
syntax_9222.title: Copy Telegram Message
syntax_9222.description: Copy an existing telegram message, and send it to a user. This is useful for storing messages sent by the bot, eg. media or other. A copied message will not have "forwarded from" to its top.

en: Copy an existing telegram message, and send it to a user. This is useful for storing messages sent by the bot, eg. media or other. A copied message will not have "forwarded from" to its top.

syntax_9223.creator: DereWah
syntax_9223.title: Telegram Username of User / Chat / Bot
syntax_9223.description: The username (mention) of a telegram user, a chat, or a bot. The username is returned without the @. If no username is set, null is returned.

en: The username (mention) of a telegram user, a chat, or a bot. The username is returned without the @. If no username is set, null is returned.

syntax_9224.creator: DereWah
syntax_9224.title: Telegram Full Name of User / Chat
syntax_9224.description: The full name of a Telegram User or, if a Chat, the title of the chat.

en: The full name of a Telegram User or, if a Chat, the title of the chat.

syntax_9225.creator: DereWah
syntax_9225.title: Telegram Language Code of User
syntax_9225.description: The language code (IT, EN, FR ... ) of a telegram user, as set in the settings by them.

en: The language code (IT, EN, FR ... ) of a telegram user, as set in the settings by them.

syntax_9218.creator: DereWah
syntax_9218.title: Edit Telegram Message
syntax_9218.description: Edit an existing, sent telegram message to a new one or to a string.
syntax_9218.syntax_pattern: edit telegram message %telegrammessage% to %telegrammessage/string% [with markdown] [with bot %string%]

en: Edit an existing, sent telegram message to a new one or to a string.

syntax_9226.creator: DereWah
syntax_9226.title: Telegram Replied Message of a Message
syntax_9226.description: Returns a Message object containing another message, the one that the original was in reply to. Cannot be set (to send messages as a reply, use the proper effect)

en: Returns a Message object containing another message, the one that the original was in reply to. Cannot be set (to send messages as a reply, use the proper effect)
